\begin{longtable}{p{5.0cm} l S[table-format=6.0] S[table-format=2.2]}
\caption{Repository adoption in biomedical open data statements. Top 25 repositories ranked by unique article count, identified by regex matching against open data statement text from oddpub v7.2.3 analysis of PubMed Central articles. Type indicates domain-specific (e.g., GenBank, GEO), general-purpose (e.g., Zenodo, Dryad), or code repositories (e.g., GitHub). Percentages are relative to 370,127 articles flagged as sharing open data. NCBI sub-resources (GenBank, GEO, SRA, dbGaP) are counted individually; ``NCBI (other)'' captures remaining NCBI mentions not attributable to a specific database. Cell shading: Unique Articles uses a blue-to-red gradient on log scale; \% of OD Articles uses a linear blue-to-red gradient.}
\label{tab:repositories} \\
